texts.content: {"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 12], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "提到新西兰，大家先想到的"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 15], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "往往是那些过分上镜的海湾和雪山"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 6], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "但真正落地时"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 15], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "先撞上的不是 postcard"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 20], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "而是跑道、航站楼和必须立刻适应的左舵路感"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 10], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "刚出发这个车它就坏了"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 11], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "然后现在要换一辆车来挤"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 14], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "这个形成的开始就是这么的专门"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 13], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "还没真正沉浸在目的地滤镜里"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 16], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "租车场和停车场就先把人拽回了现场"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 17], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "从这一刻起，这趟路看的已经不是风景"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 6], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "而是一路判断"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 4], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "很多年里"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 16], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "我认识新西兰都来自图像和名字本身"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 12], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "但真正落地之后，你会发现"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 13], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "这里不是一组等着被看的景点"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 14], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "而是一套必须亲自开进去的空间"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 15], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "离开奥克兰之后，北岛先亮出来的"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 12], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "不是名场面，而是路线本身"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 17], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "地热蒸汽和湖岸，会让空间一层层换面"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 11], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "等车逼近黑沙海岸和鸟崖"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 14], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "这条路又会突然翻成海风和悬崖"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 18], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "真正把这趟路抬到另一个尺度的，是南岛"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 13], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "普卡基、特卡波和库克山一带"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 9], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "会先把视野彻底拉开"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 10], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "但等路线逼近米尔福德"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 18], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "开阔很快又会被山体和弯道一点点压回来"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 3], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "再往后"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 17], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "皇后镇、瓦卡蒂普湖和瓦纳卡会提醒你"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 11], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "这趟穿越一直都在换地形"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 10], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "所以这支片子想记录的"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 10], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "不只是新西兰有多上镜"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 17], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "而是这片土地会怎样把想象改写成现场"}

{"styles": [{"fill": {"alpha": 1.0, "content": {"render_type": "solid", "solid": {"alpha": 1.0, "color": [1.0, 1.0, 1.0]}}}, "range": [0, 10], "size": 6.0, "bold": false, "italic": false, "underline": false, "strokes": []}], "text": "接下来，就继续往里走"}
